column1: 遺産を巡って、兄弟間で争いが起きた。
column2: いさんをめぐって、きょうだいかんであらそいがおきた。
column3: A dispute broke out between the brothers over the inheritance.
column4: を巡って (concerning, over, about — typically around a contested issue)
column5: Noun + を巡って / を巡る + Noun
column6: indicates that an argument, discussion, or conflict revolves around a central issue
column8: を巡って = revolving around contested issue; について = concerning (neutral topic); に関して = regarding (formal neutral); をめぐる = same (alternate kanji form)
